en: There are five people in our family.
There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: aiku seRay tama, tina, Runanay ay qaqa, tazungan ay qaqa matapun qemizuan.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: ibabaw tama ku, tayzin tama ku.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: qiwat tina ku, ising tina ku.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: tama ku ta leppawan temankebalan timaimian.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Kebalan language with us at home.

ab: hibangan niz imi temanan sa damu.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: aiku seRay qanqaqa ku masulun imi qemapaR tu biyat.
ch: 我和兄姊們會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.
I like our family very much.
